label: Sound parameter mapping
description: Maps a runtime parameter source to a sound property target via an optional curve.

inParam.label: Input parameter
inParam.description: Source that reads a runtime value to drive this mapping. Class attribute selects the variant.

outParam.label: Output parameter
outParam.description: Target property that receives the mapped value. Class attribute selects the variant.

paramUpdateMode.label: Parameter update mode
paramUpdateMode.description: Controls how often the mapping is evaluated: once per sample or continuously.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional piecewise linear curve that transforms the input value before applying it to the output.
